task_description: Add all 6 missing features to make DataPrism a complete A-to-Z data analysis app: Data Joining/Merging, SQL Query Interface, Column Transformations, Saved Analysis Templates, Chart Annotations, and Data Dictionary. All features include Supabase integration with graceful fallback.

verification.summary: All files compile cleanly. pandasql installs and works. SQL sandboxing blocks dangerous statements. Regex bounds reject pathological patterns. Column transforms, templates, annotations, and data dictionary all import and function correctly.
